title: Compose Development, Overrides, Profiles, Watch, and Test Workflows · Docker Retrieval
summary: An operations reviewer reconstructs compose development, overrides, profiles, watch, and test workflows from delayed evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and extends the development and test Compose workflow matrix under a changed constraint. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for development and test Compose workflow matrix after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Merge base, development, test, and local Compose files while predicting mapping, sequence, reset, replace, and path resolution behavior.
Use profiles and explicit service targeting for optional tools without silently omitting required dependencies.
Choose sync, rebuild, restart, sync-and-restart, initial sync, and ignore behavior from code, dependency, config, and platform changes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Docker Compose Files Merge Reset · changed case · Review Docker Compose Files Merge Reset
steps.instruction:
review case — A review override bind-mounts production paths, watch rebuilds on generated files, and dev and test profiles silently change dependencies. Render every file combination and isolate disposable state. Competency probe: Merge base, development, test, and local Compose files while predicting mapping, sequence, reset, replace, and path resolution behavior.
